assignments.name: business_name
assignments.value: ={{ ((Array.isArray($('Fetch Business Profile').item.json) ? $('Fetch Business Profile').item.json[0] : $('Fetch Business Profile').item.json).name) || '' }}

assignments.name: industry
assignments.value: ={{ ((Array.isArray($('Fetch Business Profile').item.json) ? $('Fetch Business Profile').item.json[0] : $('Fetch Business Profile').item.json).industry) || '' }}

assignments.name: tone
assignments.value: ={{ ((Array.isArray($('Fetch Business Profile').item.json) ? $('Fetch Business Profile').item.json[0] : $('Fetch Business Profile').item.json).tone) || '' }}

assignments.name: services
assignments.value: ={{ JSON.stringify(((Array.isArray($('Fetch Business Profile').item.json) ? $('Fetch Business Profile').item.json[0] : $('Fetch Business Profile').item.json).services) || []) }}

assignments.name: pricing_rules
assignments.value: ={{ JSON.stringify(((Array.isArray($('Fetch Business Profile').item.json) ? $('Fetch Business Profile').item.json[0] : $('Fetch Business Profile').item.json).pricing_rules) || {}) }}

assignments.name: approval_mode
assignments.value: ={{ ((Array.isArray($('Fetch Business Profile').item.json) ? $('Fetch Business Profile').item.json[0] : $('Fetch Business Profile').item.json).approval_mode) || 'approval_queue' }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  team_id: $('Receive from WF1').item.json.body.team_id,
  workspace_id: $('Receive from WF1').item.json.body.workspace_id || null,
  conversation_id: $json.conversation_id,
  customer_name: $json.customer_name,
  customer_email: $json.customer_email,
  intent: $json.intent,
  urgency: $json.urgency,
  estimated_value: Number($json.estimated_value) || 0,
  risk_type: $json.risk_type,
  risk_score: Number($json.risk_score) || 0,
  status: 'new',
  next_action: $json.recommended_action,
  confidence: Number($json.confidence) || 0
} }}

={{ {
  lead_id: $('Normalize Lead Result').item.json.lead_id,
  conversation_id: $('Parse AI Response').item.json.conversation_id,
  team_id: $('Receive from WF1').item.json.body.team_id,
  intent: $('Parse AI Response').item.json.intent,
  urgency: $('Parse AI Response').item.json.urgency,
  estimated_value: Number($('Parse AI Response').item.json.estimated_value) || 0,
  missing_fields: $('Parse AI Response').item.json.missing_fields,
  confidence: Number($('Parse AI Response').item.json.confidence) || 0,
  approval_mode: $('Parse AI Response').item.json.approval_mode
} }}

={{ {
  conversation_id: $json.conversation_id,
  customer_name: $json.customer_name,
  customer_email: $json.customer_email,
  intent: $json.intent,
  urgency: $json.urgency,
  estimated_value: Number($json.estimated_value) || 0,
  risk_type: $json.risk_type,
  risk_score: Number($json.risk_score) || 0,
  next_action: $json.recommended_action,
  confidence: Number($json.confidence) || 0,
  updated_at: $now.toISO()
} }}
